description: Transcribe audio file(s) to text / json / diarized_json via the OpenAI API and write the transcript to a file under record_store.
rules: calls the OpenAI audio transcription API; requires the openai SDK installed and OPENAI_API_KEY exported
defaults to gpt-4o-mini-transcribe with response-format text for fast transcription
diarized_json + known-speaker references require model gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize (max 4 speakers)
the transcript is written to record_store as transcript.txt; degrades to an empty result when the SDK or key is absent
local-only: writes a transcript file, does not push to or mutate any remote service
usage: Set AUDIO (audio file path). Optional: MODEL, RESPONSE_FORMAT (text|json|diarized_json), LANGUAGE, KNOWN_SPEAKER (NAME=PATH). Output: transcript.txt.
limitation: Live API call: needs the openai SDK + OPENAI_API_KEY and network. Offline (no SDK/key) it emits an empty transcript. Audio must be <= 25MB.
